title: Federal Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Federal Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Federal Bank! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Federal Bank:
Federal Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Federal Bank!
